summary: Video set to music with narration. Desaturated black-and-white illustrations: settlers with a horse and dog walking through a redwood forest, and young people holding a U.S. flag and looking upward. The title 'ONE AMERICAN HERITAGE' recurs over the images. Narration: 'one family, one glorious nation under God... the future's ours.' The clip ends on a black card with the white Department of Labor seal.

script.scene: Black-and-white illustration of settlers with a horse and dog walking through a sunlit redwood forest; animated title 'ONE AMERICAN HERITAGE'; music with narration begins.
Black-and-white illustration of young people looking upward while holding a U.S. flag; title 'ONE AMERICAN HERITAGE'; narration: 'one family, one glorious nation under God...'
Continued illustration of young people holding a flag; title 'ONE AMERICAN HERITAGE.'
Illustration with rising music; narration: 'nothing will stand in our way because we are Americans, the future's ours.'
Black end card with the white Department of Labor seal.

notable_text: ONE AMERICAN HERITAGE; (VO) one family, one glorious nation under God... the future's ours; (tweet) The Future is Ours
